item.title: You can't exterminate ants with microwaves
item.description: In this video I put some ants in my microwave to test the theory that they are too small to absorb microwaves. I put them in my top secret microwave where I figured out how to film inside the microwave so you can actually see the ants inside of the microwave when in is turned on.

media:content.media:title: You can't exterminate ants with microwaves
media:content.media:description: In this video I put some ants in my microwave to test the theory that they are too small to absorb microwaves. I put them in my top secret microwave where I figured out how to film inside the microwave so you can actually see the ants inside of the microwave when in is turned on.

item.title: Controlling other people with my brain
item.description: A real-world neuroscience experiment where we take away a volunteer's free will over their hand by intercepting his own brain's electrical signals and injecting them into the volunteer's arm.

media:content.media:title: Controlling other people with my brain
media:content.media:description: A real-world neuroscience experiment where we take away a volunteer's free will over their hand by intercepting his own brain's electrical signals and injecting them into the volunteer's arm.

item.title: Balls of steel make a sonic boom
item.description: I make a shockwave with two steel ball

media:content.media:title: Balls of steel make a sonic boom
media:content.media:description: I make a shockwave with two steel ball

item.title: Can power lines really light a bulb in your hand?
item.description: Discover why a light bulb can glow under high-voltage power lines. But does this strange effect mean power lines are actually dangerous?

media:content.media:title: Can power lines really light a bulb in your hand?
media:content.media:description: Discover why a light bulb can glow under high-voltage power lines. But does this strange effect mean power lines are actually dangerous?

item.title: What's a gömböc and why it shouldn't exist?!
item.description: A look at the gömböc, a rare shape in physics and math that seems not to exist, yet does.

media:content.media:title: What's a gömböc and why it shouldn't exist?!
media:content.media:description: A look at the gömböc, a rare shape in physics and math that seems not to exist, yet does.

item.title: How salt fingering helps the oceans
item.description: A simple look at salt fingering, a physics and chemistry process that helps shape ocean mixing.

media:content.media:title: How salt fingering helps the oceans
media:content.media:description: A simple look at salt fingering, a physics and chemistry process that helps shape ocean mixing.

item.title: Can you cook an egg just by dropping it?
item.description: A simple physics experiment asks whether an egg can cook from a drop alone

media:content.media:title: Can you cook an egg just by dropping it?
media:content.media:description: A simple physics experiment asks whether an egg can cook from a drop alone
